subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Mrs. P. et al, spoken on 1920-01-05
subcodes.first_line: She had passed her thirtieth year and after five years she was martyred... When this girl (bride of Mirza Mahmud) was quite young, her father was martyred
subcodes.subjects: @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @suffering and imprisonment, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
